source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/GF(F4335-AW)승인원/에스제이아이/MI39-02339A_REV00[SEONG JI](2).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval package for SEONGJI INDUSTRIAL C_WIRE_CABLE code MI39-02339A, drawing SJ18-06-036, model S4343-AW/S4335-AW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports supplier approval, inspection, process control, packing, and material specification traceability for the wire cable component.
keyPoints: Samsung requested MI39-02339A approval material for S4343-AW/S4335-AW new approval on 2019-01-10.
The request for approval identifies item C_WIRE_CABLE, code MI39-02339A, drawing SJ18-06-036, model S4343-AW/S4335-AW, and Rev. 00.
Revision history records Rev. 00 dated 2019-01-10 as initial approval.
Control plan and outgoing inspection records include RoHS substance limits, electrical continuity, hipot, wire length, pull-force, and visual inspection criteria.
Wire material specifications identify UL 1061 hook-up wire with UL/CSA flame and wiring standards.

entities.name: Samsung Electronics
entities.evidence: 삼성전자주식회사(이하 "삼성")는 (성지산업)(이하"협력사")에게 아래와 같은 내용으로 자료 제공을 요청합니다.

entities.name: Dalian Techtron Cable LTD.

entities.name: HongLin
entities.evidence: E239426 AWM 1061 80 300V 24AWG VW-1········ C AWM I A 80 300V 24AWG FT1 HONGLIN LM

concepts.name: KS Q ISO 2859-1 sampling inspection
concepts.evidence: 검사방식 KS Q ISO 2859-1 S-4 AQL : 1.00 보통검사

evidence.claim: Samsung requested technical material from Seongji Industrial for new approval of S4343-AW/S4335-AW.
The requested material was MI39-02339A approval documentation.
evidence.evidenceText: 요청 자료명 제공 여부 1 MI39-02339A 승인원 예

evidence.claim: The approval request identifies item C_WIRE_CABLE, code MI39-02339A, drawing SJ18-06-036, and model S4343-AW/S4335-AW.
evidence.evidenceText: ITEM C_WIRE_CABLE ... MI39-02339A CODE No. DWG No. MODEL SJ18-06-036 S4343-AW/S4335-AW

evidence.claim: The approval document revision is Rev. 00.
Rev. 00 is recorded as initial approval dated 2019-01-10.
The approval package states a validity term of at least 15 years from issued date.
evidence.evidenceText: A TERM OF VALIDITY OVER AT LEAST 15-YEARS FROM ISSUED DATE

evidence.claim: The control plan document number is SJKG-PQ-497A-00.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category □ DV, □ PV , ■ PR , □ SOP Document no SJKG-PQ-497A-00

evidence.claim: The control plan identifies part name WIFI WIRE CABLE and SEC part number MI39-02339A.
evidence.evidenceText: Part Name WIFI WIRE CABLE ... SEC Part No, MI39-02339A

evidence.claim: RoHS incoming inspection controls include cadmium, lead, mercury, hexavalent chromium, and bromine limits.
evidence.evidenceText: 1-4 RoHS ... Cd（유기물） - ≤50ppm ... Pb（유기물） - ≤200ppm ... Hg（유기물） - ≤700ppm ... Cr 6+ - ≤700ppm ... BR（비금속） - ≤300ppm

evidence.claim: Outgoing inspection uses KS Q ISO 2859-1, S-4, AQL 1.00 normal inspection.
evidence.evidenceText: 검사방식 KS Q ISO 2859-1 S-4 AQL : 1.00 보통검사

evidence.claim: Outgoing inspection specifies wire/cable as UL 1061 #30 UL/CSA approval.
Electrical performance inspection requires no open, short, or mis-wiring during continuity testing.
evidence.evidenceText: 도통검사 Connector Ass'y를 JIG 또는 TESTE기로 도통시험 시 OPEN 및 SHORT, 오배선등이 없고 이상 없이 통전될 것

evidence.claim: Hipot inspection condition is AC100, 0.01 sec.
evidence.evidenceText: [HIPOT] 버튼을 눌러 내 전압 조건을 설정한다. [내 전압 조건 : AC100, 0.01sec]

evidence.claim: Packing method identifies code MI39-02339A, specification SJ18-06-036, model SDR-C4335W, and date 2019-01-10.
evidence.evidenceText: PACKING METHODE DESCRIPTION C_WIRE_CABLE CODE No. MI39-02339A SPECIFICATION SJ18-06-036 MODEL SDR C4335W DATE 2019 01 10

evidence.claim: UL 1061 hook-up wire is described as lead free SR-PVC insulation with stranded tinned copper conductor.
evidence.evidenceText: UL 1061 HOOK-UP WIRE (LEAD FREE) ... Stranded tinned copper conductor ... Lead free SR-PVC insulation

evidence.claim: UL 1061 hook-up wire references UL 758, UL1581, and CSA C22.2 No.210.2.
Dalian Techtron UL Style 1061 product specification references UL758, UL 1581, UL 2556, CSA C22.2 No.210.2, 2002/95/EC(RoHS), and SONY SS-00259.
evidence.evidenceText: Reference Standard -UL758,UL 1581,UL 2556 & CSA C22.2 No.210.2 -2002/95/EC(RoHS) -SONY SS-00259

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal is FDA, but the provided source text does not mention FDA or an FDA regulatory clearance.
No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is explicitly identified; Samsung appears as customer/requestor rather than regulator.
OCR quality is uneven, with duplicated lines, broken Korean/English text, and garbled characters in at least one drawing-related section.
The source combines multiple document types, including request form, approval sheet, control plan, inspection report, work standards, packing method, and wire material specifications.
Product metadata signal HAD/A/F 1417-1717 is not present in the source text; extracted product models are limited to models visible in the document.
